title: selliguea engleri
intro: Selliguea engleri, also known as the Chinese polypody, is a type of fern native to Asia, particularly in China and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its active compounds such as flavonoids and polysaccharides. The health benefits of Selliguea engleri include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as an herbal decoction, or dried and used as an infusion, and is also used in modern herbal preparations such as capsules and tablets.
